summary: Deep backend API testing for Influencer Connect. All 41 tests passed covering schema validation, data integrity, error handling (400/401/404/422), and edge cases for all 16 required endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/messages does not filter by user_id — returns all messages globally (line 781: db.messages.find({}, ...)). Any authenticated user can read all messages. Consider adding user_id filter.
PATCH /api/messages/{id}/read does not verify ownership — any authenticated user can mark any message as read.
POST /api/agent/send-outreach sends real email via Gmail SMTP — works correctly, sent test to safe address influencerconnectai@hotmail.com
seed_data_creation: Test user and session re-seeded via mongosh. Test campaign created and cleaned up per test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 endpoints tested and passing. /api/health returns 200 (was added in server.py). Auth via Bearer token works. Campaign CRUD with stage validation, AI scoring (LLM fallback works), Brand Agent (Bedrock) returned 200, outreach email sent successfully via Gmail SMTP. Messages endpoint has a minor ownership issue (no user_id filter). Influencer data: 20 influencers seeded globally. Score-influencers uses real LLM (claude-sonnet) with fallback.
rca_of_issues: No critical issues found. Minor: messages collection has no user_id ownership filter which could expose messages across users in a multi-tenant scenario.
